---
title: "Publications"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: pubs.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(RefManageR)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(htmltools)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

bib <- ReadBib("bibliography/publications_sugier.bib", check = FALSE)
df <- as.data.frame(bib) |> as_tibble()

# Colonnes attendues (créées si absentes)
need_cols <- c("year","keywords","title","journal","volume","number","pages","doi","url","author")
for (nm in need_cols) if (!nm %in% names(df)) df[[nm]] <- NA

df <- df |>
  mutate(
    year     = suppressWarnings(as.integer(year)),
    keywords = ifelse(is.na(keywords), "", as.character(keywords)),
    title    = ifelse(is.na(title), "", as.character(title)),
    journal  = ifelse(is.na(journal), "", as.character(journal)),
    volume   = ifelse(is.na(volume), "", as.character(volume)),
    number   = ifelse(is.na(number), "", as.character(number)),
    pages    = ifelse(is.na(pages), "", as.character(pages)),
    doi      = ifelse(is.na(doi), "", as.character(doi)),
    url      = ifelse(is.na(url), "", as.character(url)),
    author   = ifelse(is.na(author), "", as.character(author))
  )

# --- helpers ---------------------------------------------------------------

get_kw <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || !nzchar(x)) return(character(0))
  str_split(tolower(x), ",")[[1]] |> trimws()
}

bucket <- function(kws) {
  if ("method" %in% kws) return("method")
  if ("application_advanced" %in% kws) return("application_advanced")
  if ("application" %in% kws) return("application")
  if ("preprint" %in% kws) return("preprint")
  "Other"
}


# Convertit "First Middle" ou "Pierre-Emmanuel" -> "P.-E."
initials <- function(first) {
  first <- stringr::str_squish(first)
  if (!nzchar(first)) return("")

  # Découpe en mots puis sous-mots (tirets)
  words <- stringr::str_split(first, "\\s+")[[1]]
  words <- words[words != ""]

  ini_words <- purrr::map_chr(words, function(w) {
    parts <- stringr::str_split(w, "-")[[1]]
    parts <- parts[parts != ""]
    # Initiales des segments du prénom composé : P.-E.
    inis <- paste0(toupper(substr(parts, 1, 1)), ".")
    paste(inis, collapse = "-")
  })

  paste(ini_words, collapse = " ")
}

# Parse "Last, First and Last, First" (format BibTeX) ou "A and B"
parse_authors <- function(author_str) {
  s <- str_replace_all(author_str, "\\s+", " ") |> str_trim()
  if (!nzchar(s)) return(list())
  parts <- str_split(s, "\\s+and\\s+")[[1]] |> str_trim()
  parts <- parts[parts != ""]
  parts
}

# Formate les auteurs : "Nom, I." ; met ton nom en gras ; limite à max_auth
fmt_authors <- function(author_str, max_auth = 6, my_last = "Sugier", my_first = "Pierre-Emmanuel") {
  authors <- parse_authors(author_str)

  # tronque
  truncated <- FALSE
  if (length(authors) > max_auth) {
    authors <- authors[1:max_auth]
    truncated <- TRUE
  }

  formatted <- map(authors, function(a) {
    # Essaye "Last, First"
    if (str_detect(a, ",")) {
      last <- str_trim(str_split(a, ",")[[1]][1])
      first <- str_trim(paste(str_split(a, ",")[[1]][-1], collapse=" "))
    } else {
      # Sinon "First Last" (fallback)
      tokens <- str_split(a, "\\s+")[[1]]
      last <- tokens[length(tokens)]
      first <- paste(tokens[-length(tokens)], collapse=" ")
    }

    ini <- initials(first)
    txt <- paste0(last, ", ", ini)

    # met ton nom en gras (match sur le nom de famille, et optionnellement initiale P.)
    is_me <- identical(tolower(last), tolower(my_last)) &&
      (str_detect(tolower(first), "pierre") || str_detect(ini, "^P\\.") || str_detect(ini, "P\\.-E\\."))

    if (is_me) tags$strong(txt) else HTML(txt)
  })

  # ajoute et al.
  if (truncated) {
    formatted <- c(formatted, list(tags$em("et al.")))
  }

  # jointure avec virgules
  out <- list()
  for (i in seq_along(formatted)) {
    out <- c(out, list(formatted[[i]]))
    if (i < length(formatted)) out <- c(out, list(HTML(", ")))
  }
  out
}

fmt_vip <- function(volume, number, pages) {
  vi <- ""
  if (nzchar(volume)) vi <- volume
  if (nzchar(number)) vi <- paste0(vi, "(", number, ")")
  if (nzchar(vi) && nzchar(pages)) return(paste0(vi, ": ", pages))
  if (nzchar(vi)) return(vi)
  if (nzchar(pages)) return(pages)
  ""
}

best_link <- function(doi, url) {
  if (nzchar(doi)) return(paste0("https://doi.org/", doi))
  if (nzchar(url)) return(url)
  ""
}

ref_item <- function(r) {
  link <- best_link(r$doi, r$url)
  vip  <- fmt_vip(r$volume, r$number, r$pages)

  title_node <- if (nzchar(link)) {
    tags$a(r$title, href = link, target = "_blank", rel="noopener")
  } else tags$span(r$title)

  tags$li(class="pub-ref",
    tags$span(class="pub-authors", fmt_authors(r$author, max_auth = 6)),
    tags$span(class="pub-year", if (!is.na(r$year)) paste0(" (", r$year, "). ") else ". "),
    tags$span(class="pub-title", title_node),
    if (nzchar(r$journal)) tags$span(". ", tags$em(r$journal)) else NULL,
    if (nzchar(vip)) tags$span(", ", vip) else NULL,
    tags$span(".")
  )
}

render_section <- function(section_label, section_key) {
  sub <- df |>
    mutate(kw = map(keywords, get_kw),
           section = map_chr(kw, bucket)) |>
    filter(section == section_key) |>
    arrange(desc(year), title)

  if (nrow(sub) == 0) return(NULL)

  yrs <- sort(unique(sub$year[!is.na(sub$year)]), decreasing = TRUE)

  out <- list(
  tags$h2(section_label, class="pub-section"),
  tags$ol(class="pub-list", !!!map(seq_len(nrow(sub)), ~ ref_item(sub[.x, ])))
  )
#  out <- list(tags$h2(section_label, class="pub-section"))
#  for (yr in yrs) {
#    ydf <- sub |> filter(year == yr)
#    out <- c(out, list(
#      tags$h3(as.character(yr), class="pub-year-header"),
#      tags$ol(class="pub-list", !!!map(seq_len(nrow(ydf)), ~ ref_item(ydf[.x, ])))
#    ))
#  }
  out
}

tagList(
  tags$div(class="pub-wrap",
    render_section("Methodological research in biostatistics and software implementation","method"),
    render_section("Applications of advanced statistical methods", "application_advanced"),
    render_section("Other applications", "application"),
    render_section("preprint", "application")
  )
)
```
